task_completion.description: Verify the 'fells_loop' track is loaded into a GIS or GPS application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'fells_loop' track is visible in the application's layer panel, map view, or track list.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accesses the tool or dialog to edit or shift track timestamps.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box, menu, or tool panel specifically for editing track timestamps, shifting time, or adjusting track metadata is open.

task_completion.description: Verify the time shift is configured to exactly 5 hours earlier.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The time shift value in the dialog is explicitly set to subtract 5 hours (e.g., '-5 hours', '-18000 seconds', or shifting from UTC to EST).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiates the export or save process for the modified track as a GPX file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As', 'Export', or 'Save Track' dialog is open with the file format selected as GPX (*.gpx).

task_completion.description: Verify the modified track is saved to the exact expected output path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file path in the save dialog is set to 'C:\workspace\output\time_corrected_fells.gpx', or a file explorer window shows this exact file created in the output folder.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a graphical application to perform the time shift.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a GUI-based GIS/GPS software rather than a terminal window running command-line utilities (like ogr2ogr or gpsbabel) to process the file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the application by writing a script or manually editing the XML.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors (like Notepad or VS Code) open with Python scripts or raw GPX XML data being manually manipulated to change the timestamps.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually exported a new file rather than just renaming the original.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen using the application's export/save functionality after applying the time shift, rather than just copying and renaming the file in the file explorer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original file is located at 'C:\workspace\data\fells_loop.gpx'. The task requires shifting the timestamps exactly 5 hours backward, which equates to -18000 seconds. The final output must be exported exactly to 'C:\workspace\output\time_corrected_fells.gpx'.
